items.question: How does cashback work?
items.answer: When you shop through Cashog, we earn a commission from the store. We share that commission back with you as cashback. Simply click through our links, shop as normal, and we'll track your purchase and add cashback to your account.

items.question: Is Cashog really free?
items.answer: Yes! Cashog is completely free to join and use. There are no membership fees, subscription costs, or hidden charges. We only make money when you earn cashback, so we're motivated to help you save.

items.question: How do I get paid?
items.answer: You can withdraw your earnings via PayPal, bank transfer, or gift cards. Most withdrawals are processed within 24-48 hours. The minimum payout is typically $10, but some stores may have different minimums.

items.question: How long does cashback take to appear?
items.answer: Most cashback appears in your account within 24-72 hours after purchase. Some stores may take longer (up to 30 days) for the return period to expire. This protects against returns and cancellations.

items.question: Can I use coupons with cashback?
items.answer: Yes! In most cases, you can stack cashback with store coupons, promo codes, and even credit card rewards. Just make sure you start from Cashog first and don't use third-party coupon sites that might override our tracking.

items.question: Is cashback available on mobile?
items.answer: Absolutely! Download our mobile app for iOS and Android to earn cashback on the go. The app often features exclusive deals and boosted cashback rates you won't find on desktop.

items.question: What stores offer cashback?
items.answer: We work with over 1,000 stores including Amazon, Walmart, Target, eBay, Best Buy, Expedia, and many more. New stores are added regularly. Check our website or app for the complete list.

items.question: What if my cashback doesn't track?
items.answer: If your cashback doesn't appear within 7 days, you can submit a missing cashback claim through your account dashboard. Our support team will investigate and add the cashback manually if the purchase qualified.
